changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_capture for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions accurately map to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities, which are relevant to the NIST 800-53 AU-12-a control. The naming mostly follows conventions, but a minor adjustment was made for consistency. The functions are technically accurate and reflect real Kubernetes audit logging features.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names are concise and follow the pattern k8s_<resource>_<check_description> without unnecessary words
title: Audit Record Generation - Provide audit record generation capability...
step1_reasoning: The control AU-12-a focuses on audit record generation, which directly maps to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logging features that can be configured to capture detailed audit records of API server interactions. This includes enabling audit logging, configuring audit policies to capture necessary metadata, and ensuring audit logs are retained appropriately.
